theorem_sketch.statement: On V(E), #F^{-1}(t) ∈ {0,1} for every complex t. Size-2 does not occur. Spectrum = {0,1,3}.
human_steps: Phi_x annihilator (anatomy); reduces on E=0 to linear or empty
R12 identity at double root: residual = a-t2 independent of x
case t1=t2=0: triple root, unique x, fiber≤1

spectrum_implication.bracket_note: If human case-split accepted, jc-fiber-count-spectrum-size closes to 3. This package does NOT auto-update the ledger.

claim_boundary: Conditional on jc-anatomy annihilators. Does not mint DOI.
